creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Brad Davis from comment #3)

Great that you mentioned that.

I re-tested this upgrade on FreeBSD 13, and it's working fine.

However, on 14-CURRENT, the current version still doesn't work and shows the same error I mentioned above during the upgrade test.

In light of this, I'll proceed here with your first patch.

Thanks.
